# Combat

<!-- source: PDF p.57 -->

## Battles View

<!-- p.58 -->

## Battle sequence

<!-- p.58 -->

## Army Setup

<!-- p.58 -->

### Formations

<!-- p.59 -->

### Battlefield movement

<!-- p.60 -->

## Melee combat

<!-- p.60 -->

### Armor defeating hits

<!-- p.61 -->

### Shield destruction

<!-- p.61 -->

### Hit locations

<!-- p.61 -->

### Weapon types

<!-- p.61 -->

### Harassed

<!-- p.62 -->

### Fatigue

<!-- p.62 -->

#### Unconsciousness

<!-- p.62 -->

### Repel

<!-- p.62 -->

### Multiple attacks

<!-- p.63 -->

#### Multiple weapons

<!-- p.63 -->

### Melee attack resolution

<!-- p.63 -->

### Dancing Weapons

<!-- p.64 -->

## Mounted Units

<!-- p.64 -->

### Hitting mounted units

<!-- p.64 -->

### Mounted units and magic items

<!-- p.64 -->

### Rider skill

<!-- p.64 -->

### Mounted units and morale

<!-- p.64 -->

### Rerecruiting mounted units

<!-- p.65 -->

## Missile combat

<!-- p.65 -->

## Special damage

<!-- p.66 -->

### Fire damage

<!-- p.66 -->

### Cold damage

<!-- p.66 -->

### Profuse bleeding

<!-- p.66 -->

### Poison damage

<!-- p.66 -->

### Shock damage

<!-- p.67 -->

### Acid damage

<!-- p.67 -->

### Rust

<!-- p.67 -->

### Life Drain damage

<!-- p.67 -->

### Paralysis damage

<!-- p.67 -->

### Fatigue damage

<!-- p.68 -->

### False damage

<!-- p.68 -->

## Clouds

<!-- p.68 -->

## Morale and rout

<!-- p.69 -->

### Morale

<!-- p.69 -->

### Morale bonuses

<!-- p.69 -->

#### Morale, magic bonus

<!-- p.69 -->

### Rout

<!-- p.69 -->

#### Army rout

<!-- p.70 -->

#### Morale check

<!-- p.70 -->

#### Rout effects

<!-- p.70 -->

#### Mindless units

<!-- p.70 -->

#### Magic beings and undead

<!-- p.70 -->

#### Magic fear effects

<!-- p.70 -->

#### Long lasting battles and Twilight

<!-- p.71 -->

## Afflictions

<!-- p.71 -->

## Sieges

<!-- p.71 -->

### Supply during sieges

<!-- p.72 -->

## Storming a castle

<!-- p.72 -->

## Weather

<!-- p.72 -->

## Retreats

<!-- p.72 -->

### Retreating when besieged

<!-- p.73 -->

## Battle Summary

<!-- p.73 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
